summary: Completed comprehensive testing of URL transcription feature for premium users. All core functionality working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized access

passed_tests: URL tab visible in dashboard with crown icon
POST /api/transcriptions/url starts download for admin users (200 response)
Regular user registration and login working
URL input field available for admin users
Transcribe button enabled and functional for admin users
Premium upgrade message shown for non-premium users
Subscribe button present for non-premium users
URL transcriptions appear in history with correct titles
Supported platforms displayed correctly (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, etc.)
